description: Moves the render viewport (world.camera) to keep a tagged entity centered, with optional smoothing (ease) and a centered deadzone, clamped to the world bounds. The runtime camera for scrolling levels — pair with a scene.world larger than scene.size.

targetTag.description: Tag of the entity to keep centered (first live match).

smoothing.description: Ease factor 0..1 per tick toward the target; 1 = hard snap.

deadzone.description: Centered { w, h } box (px) the target moves freely within before the camera pans.
